untranslatable_reason: Signal requires market regime detection (BULL_MARKET vs BEAR_MARKET) which is not provided as a real-time indicator in the allowed list. The source text describes different confirmation methods and close positioning strategies that depend on market context, but the backtest engine only supports TRENDING_UP, TRENDING_DOWN, RANGING, HIGH_VOL, or ANY regimes. Exit conditions marked AUTHOR_SILENT require interpretation of post-breakout performance metrics not directly expressible as entry/exit rules.
translation_notes: Attempted to capture the Advance Block pattern using: (1) Close below 50-day MA as the block condition, (2) Lower close next day for bull confirmation, (3) Black candle (close < open) for bear confirmation. The pattern's context-dependent nature and reliance on market regime classification cannot be fully expressed with available indicators. Success rates, average moves, and volume trends were marked AUTHOR_SILENT and therefore omitted. Exit positioning strategy (middle vs high of candle) cannot be encoded in standard entry/exit rules.
